title: Marinated Rice Vermicelli with Sun-Dried Mushrooms
description: A nutty and tender vegetarian-friendly Ukrainian dish featuring rice vermicelli marinated in a savory sauce with sun-dried mushrooms, perfect for weeknight dinners.

ingredients.name: Sun-Dried Mushrooms
ingredients.notes: soaked in hot water for about 30 minutes before use

instructions: Rinse the rice vermicelli under cold water and soak them in hot water for about 20 minutes. Drain well.
Saute minced garlic in a pan with vegetable oil until fragrant, about 30 seconds to 1 minute.
Add sun-dried mushrooms that have been drained of excess moisture. Cook over medium heat for about 5-7 minutes or until they release their liquid and start to soften.
Stir in soaked rice vermicelli and any optional vegetables like red bell pepper or leek/onion with minced garlic, and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until everything is heated through.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste. Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
Optional: Add chopped fresh herbs such as parsley or dill during the last minute of cooking for extra freshness.
